calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-120 SHY decay parameter sweep (0.90/0.95/0.98 x 20/40 writes)
items.notes: 7 conditions x 3 seeds. Finds decay/write regime where SHY differentiates without collapsing. Supersedes EXQ-245a (decay=0.85 too aggressive).
